project_info.name: VideyView
project_info.stack: Laravel (Backend) + Inertia.js / Vue 3 (Frontend) + Tailwind CSS + XAMPP

authentication.security_note: Forgot Password link redirected to Telegram; Admin can reset all passwords via Dashboard.

video_hosting: Manual URL Link for external CDNs (Videy.co, etc.)
Video Proxy (/video-proxy) to bypass ISP/WAF restrictions on Videy links.
ISP Bypass Client (App\Helpers\IspBypassClient) using CURLOPT_RESOLVE for hosting APIs.
Fast-Intake Bulk JSON: Process thousands of links via automated background workers.

thumbnail_system.mechanism: FFmpeg thumbnail extraction on-demand or batch.

monetization: Rebranded 'Special Offer' button as 'DOWNLOAD VIDEO' (Smartlink integration)
Subscription System: hasActiveSubscription() for premium content.
Admin Ad Guard: Internal AdHandler security to prevent ad leakage in Dashboard.

features: Aggressive Baiting: Combined <ins> and <div> traps with randomized ID cycling every 1s.
Mutation Monitoring: MutationObserver targeting 'ins iframe' to detect 1px scaling/hiding hacks.
Self-Healing: Automatic modal re-render if deleted via DevTools.
Zero-Cooldown: Removed cycle limits to ensure 24/7 active radar.
Trust-JS Recovery: Prioritizes successful ads-check.js loading for instant hard-refresh recovery.

video_health_monitoring.mechanism: 3-Layer Validation (Local Storage, Videy CDN HEAD, Streamtape API Status).
video_health_monitoring.storage: Persistent health_report (JSON) and last_check_at (Timestamp) fields in videos table.
video_health_monitoring.automation: Artisan Command (video:check-health) and Manual Trigger in Admin Dashboard.
video_health_monitoring.ui_indicators: Color-coded status dots (LOC, VDY, TAP) in Admin Video Management grid.

admin_visibility_2.0: Hosting Badges: Visual overlays (Local, Videy, Tape) on thumbnails for instant oversight.
Server Identity Masking: Conditional rendering hides host names from guests, showing only to Admins.
VIP Support UI: Redesigned Member Priority box with pulsing emerald status and premium aesthetics.

stages: FLOW 1 (Direct Upload): Admin upload file dari pc ke aplikasi -> simpan di local aplikasi -> aplikasi upload ke videy.co (jika bisa) dan streamtape (prioritas). Pembuatan thumbnail via sync.py (backdoor) jika video sudah ada.

FLOW 2 (Bulk JSON): Admin upload file json link videy.co -> simpan data link -> aplikasi download ke lokal (manual user via sync.py) -> app cek video & thumbnail lokal -> jika ada, upload ke streamtape.
ISP BYPASS 2.0: Direct backend IP (195.35.23.222) mapping for Streamtape to circumvent DNS/SNI hijacking.
REAL-TIME SYNC: Worker-to-Master percentage reporting (every 5%) for active transparency.

ASYNC REMOTE TRACKING: App\Jobs\CheckRemoteUploadJob is strictly dispatched to a prioritized 'checkers' queue to constantly poll api.streamtape.to/remotedl/status asynchronously. If extid/url is detected, it instantly flags the video as success without waiting for legacy 'finished' status strings.
FAIL-SAFE SYNC v2: sync.py handles total download failure and FFmpeg corruption by deleting the file and reporting 'failed' status to Laravel.
automated_distribution_pipeline.real_time_monitor: Dashboard uses global 3s polling (Admin/VideoController@progress) to update Ready, Pending, and Mirrored stats independently of the current page view.

features: On-Demand Fetch: Links provided via timed AJAX only upon playback intent.
Link Masking: No raw cdn.videy.co or streamtape.com URLs in DOM/Network Tab.
Anti-Inspect: Disabled right-click context menu on player area.
Local Relay: Serve data via dynamic video-proxy route to hide origin domains.
API Obfuscation: Streamtape API Key in Admin Settings includes an Eye-Icon toggle for masking/unmasking sensitive credentials.

ad_leakage_prevention.problem: Sensitive pages like Login/Admin were loading ad scripts and anti-adblock modals, compromising professional aesthetic and potentially security.
ad_leakage_prevention.solution: Implemented route-aware middleware and strict component-level guards.
technical_details: Middleware (HandleInertiaRequests.php): Conditional prop sharing ensures 'ads' and 'anti_adblock_enabled' are null/false for restricted routes.
AdHandler.vue: Component now monitors window.route() and executes aggressive DOM cleanup on unmount.
AntiAdblockGuard.vue: Detection logic and DOM baits are explicitly disabled for admin routes and authenticated admins.

anti_adblock_toggle.feature: Admin controllable toggle for global anti-adblock detection.
anti_adblock_toggle.implementation: Setting 'anti_adblock_enabled' stored in DB, shared via Inertia, and used for conditional rendering in MainLayout.vue.

doodstream_integration.goal: High-performance video mirroring with Indonesian ISP bypass.
components: Admin Dashboard: Distribution Pipeline visualizes success/pending counts for both Streamtape and Doodstream.

player_server_selector.v3.0: Autonomous Media Empire - Fortress (Backup), Robot (Auto-Healer), Aura (Theme Engine)
player_server_selector.v4.0: Imperium Expansion - Search 2.0, Social Engine (Waitlist/Likes), Protection (Dynamic Watermark/Content Guard), Mobility (PWA), Visibility (Auto-Sitemap)
player_server_selector.logic: Dynamic multi-host switching with static user labels.
player_server_selector.sorting: Fixed order as requested by Mandor. Buttons only appear if the specific host has a status of 'success' or local storage exists.

admin_dashboard.ui_design: Glassmorphism architecture using 'backdrop-blur-20px' and 'bg-slate-800/40'. Features vibrant duo-tone cards with pulsed status indicators.
admin_dashboard.data_engine: Real-time statistics cached for 60s. Uses raw DB collection for mirror efficiency (Streamtape vs Doodstream success ratios) and storage health tracking (total_local vs total_videos).
admin_dashboard.activity_log: Integrated 'Recent Logistics' feed showing the last 5 video distributions with multi-host status badges.

manual_link_sync.controller_logic: Admin\VideoController@bulkSyncLinks processes raw text logs. It employs a two-pass parser: first extracting ID-Slug and then associating the subsequent URL.
manual_link_sync.regex_pattern: /<!--\s*(?:video-)?([a-z0-9-]+)\s*-->/i (Case-insensitive capture of Videy Slugs/IDs from HTML comments).
manual_link_sync.database_match: Uses Eloquent with 'LOWER(slug) LIKE ?' to ensure cross-platform ID matching regardless of casing in raw logs.
manual_link_sync.update_atomic: Updates 'mirror_links' and 'hosting_status' objects partially without overwriting other host data.

dynamic_server_switcher.public_labels: Static naming (Server 1, Server 2, Server 3, Server 4) to maintain consistent UX and branding.
dynamic_server_switcher.admin_labels: Dynamic identity masking; Admins see real host names (Streamtape, Doodstream, Local) for debugging.
dynamic_server_switcher.visibility_logic: Conditional Rendering in Show.vue: Buttons only appear if 'hosting_status->[host] === success' AND mirror_links[host] is not null.

infrastructure_fortress.admin_log_viewer: Full-stack diagnostic dashboard (LogController + Admin/Logs.vue) for real-time error tracking and health oversight.
infrastructure_fortress.memory_optimized_diagnostics: LogController employs a custom stream reader with fseek, enabling O(1) memory access to the last 100 lines of massive log files, preventing 500 errors.
infrastructure_fortress.pwa_premium: Full PWA manifest implementation with custom 'Neon Indigo Shield' maskable icons and brand-synchronized theme coloring.

ghost_automation.auto_healing_engine: CheckVideoHealthJob upgraded to autonomously trigger re-distribution (DistributeToHostJob) for specific dead hosts (Doodstream/Streamtape) without admin intervention.
ghost_automation.seo_pro: Dynamic OpenGraph pipeline injected through HandleInertiaRequests middleware, delivering high-fidelity social previews for video shared via Telegram/WhatsApp.

build_stabilization_royale.mathematical_tag_audit: Strict protocol for resolving 'onclosetag' errors in Vite. Utilizes Python-based stack verification to identify mismatched phrasing content (e.g., div inside h3) and redundant closing tags in nested Royale Light layouts.
build_stabilization_royale.surgical_patching: Use of raw byte/line-specific patching scripts (fix_tags.py) to bypass whitespace-sensitive IDE editing limitations, ensuring binary-stable Vue template balancing.

elite_ux.theme_engine_v5: Global Dark/Light mode implementation using CSS variable architecture and localStorage persistence.
elite_ux.linen_indigo_palette: Premium Royale Light aesthetic using HSL-derived Linen (249 250 252) background and Deep Slate (15 23 42) text for high-fidelity legibility.
elite_ux.custom_player_skins: Injected CSS Shadow DOM overrides to theme the HTML5 player with Indigo accents, consistent with VideyView's premium branding.

ad_leakage_mitigation.middleware: Implemented route-aware conditional prop sharing in HandleInertiaRequests.php. Ads are now null for Admin/Auth routes regardless of user state.
ad_leakage_mitigation.components: Hardened AdHandler.vue and AntiAdblockGuard.vue with route-based guards and aggressive DOM cleanup in onUnmounted().
ad_leakage_mitigation.validation: Ensured no ad scripts or baits are present on Login, Register, or Admin Dashboard pages.

multi_host_dashboard.pipeline: Visual tracking from Videy Source -> Local Cache -> Multi-Host Mirroring.
multi_host_dashboard.stats: Real-time mirroring success tracking for all registered hosts in Admin Dashboard.

user_experience.server_selection: Dynamic player server selector with priority-based sorting (Mirrors for free users, Local for premium/admin).

external_hosting.primary: Streamtape (Host Integration 2.0: Editable via Admin > Settings).
external_hosting.secondary: Doodstream (Studied & Ready: Secondary/Backup Host with ISP Bypass).
external_hosting.automation: Zero-Click: Mirroring starts automatically after Local Worker (sync.py) reports completion.

api_patterns.auth: Must include 'login={api_login}&key={api_key}' in all GET/POST requests.

streamtape.status: Dinamis: Managed via Admin Panel Database (~settings table).

isp_bypass.reason: Avoids 'Internet Positif' DNS hijacking and SNI filtering on primary domains.

api_patterns.auth: Always use 'key={api_key}' as a query parameter (GET/POST).

remote_upload.behavior: Returns instant filecode; download happens in background.

monetization: Rebranded 'Special Offer' button as 'DOWNLOAD VIDEO' (Smartlink integration)
Subscription System: hasActiveSubscription() for premium content.
Admin & Premium Ad Guard: Blocks all ad rendering for paid members and admins.
member_management: Contact Collection: Integrated WA/Telegram field into Registration.
Admin Dashboard: Privacy-locked contact display and manual member reset.
Premium Power: Direct 'Grant Premium' logic for manual account upgrades.
Tiered Promotion: Auto-switch CTAs (Guest -> Channel, Member -> @Mandorbuah).
zero_click_automation: Auto-Save Mode: Extracted links are instantly queued for processing.
Sync Bridge: One-click sync_list.json generation for standalone worker.bat.
ad_grid_refinement: Native In-Grid Ads: Removed containers, labels, and padding to blend ads with video thumbnails.
Zero-Gap Strategy: Aligned ad row spacing exactly with main content grid (gap-8).
Mobile Optimization: Reduced grid gap from gap-8 to gap-4 on small screens for better density.
security_auth_audit: Telegram Bypass: Redirected all forgot-password/reset-password routes to @Mandorbuah.
Desktop Logout: Added dedicated Sign Out button to header for one-click access.
Guest Lock: Implemented 'Discussion Locked' UI in Show.vue for guest users.
admin_fortress_hardening: Secret Path Obfuscation: Admin panel moved from /admin to a configurable .env variable (ADMIN_PATH).
Audit Black Box: Full activity logging in admin_activities table (User ID, Action, IP, User Agent).
Login Throttling: Strict rate limiting on login and admin routes to prevent brute force attacks.
Session Lockdown: Shorter session lifetime and restricted access for administrative routes.
Dynamic Host Logic: MultiHostServiceProvider injected via database settings to remove hardcoded API keys.

maintenance_logs_current: v5.0 DEPLOYMENT: Full scale Imperium Overhaul active.
v5.0: Deployed Centralized Log Viewer for real-time diagnostic transparency.
v5.0: Upgraded Ghost Auto-Healer with active host re-distribution logic.
v5.0: Activated SEO Pro with dynamic OpenGraph meta injection (Social Previews).
v5.0: Launched Aura Theme Engine (Dark/Light mode) with Indigo premium skinning.
v5.0: Finalized Rebranding: Purged 'Ads' terminology across system configuration.
v3.0_Upgrade (Tiga Pilar): Implemented 'Fortress Lockdown' (One-click DB Backup).
v3.0_Upgrade (Tiga Pilar): Deployed 'Robot Mandor Otonom' (Artisan Scheduler).
v3.0_Upgrade (Tiga Pilar): Installed 'Aura Mandor' (Theme Engine v1.0).
